Llm._comment: Set Provider to "openai" (default) or "anthropic". Anthropic is only used when its ApiKey is also configured.

OpenAI._comment: Never commit a real key. Set OPENAI_API_KEY as an environment variable, use dotnet user-secrets, or your cloud provider's secret manager.

Anthropic._comment: Optional. Only activated when Llm:Provider is "anthropic" AND this ApiKey is set. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as an environment variable.

Koru._comment: Base URL of the koru-main backend. Used to fetch the live template catalog.

Jwt._comment: Must match the JWT signing key used by koru-main. Set JWT_KEY as an environment variable in production.
